description_long: This is a marionette-style doll suspended from a wooden crossbar by four strings, with a round black head featuring colorful, mismatched button eyes—one green and one purple—and a stitched white mouth. The face is decorated with a white stitched pattern, giving it a slightly eerie, handmade appearance. The doll's body is dressed in a simple blue tunic, with one arm painted tan and the other red, while the legs are short and end in green and purple shoes. The wooden control bar above is light brown and consists of two intersecting slats, from which the strings descend to attach to the doll's limbs and head. The overall design is playful yet slightly macabre, reminiscent of folk or street puppetry often seen in urban parks or street performances. The materials and construction suggest a lightweight, portable toy suitable for interactive play or display.
description: A marionette doll with a black head, colorful button eyes, stitched mouth, blue tunic, mismatched arms, and green-purple shoes, suspended by strings from a wooden crossbar. The design is playful with a handmade, slightly eerie aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face with button eyes, stitched mouth, blue tunic, and both arms and legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the head, the profile of the red arm, and the arrangement of the strings and crossbar.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and body, with the attachment points of the strings and the back of the tunic.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the tan arm in profile, the side of the head, and the string arrangement from a different angle.
attribute_clothing_style: Simple blue tunic with no visible patterns, paired with mismatched green and purple shoes; the style is reminiscent of handmade or folk marionette costumes, with no clear brand or modern fashion influence.
attribute_pose: The doll's head is upright, arms are extended downward and slightly outward, and legs are straight and close together, all suspended by strings from a crossbar, giving a relaxed, hanging posture.
attribute_facial_expression: The face has a stitched, slightly smiling mouth, mismatched button eyes—one green, one purple—and no visible eyebrows, creating a quirky, neutral-to-playful expression.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and black with no hair texture or adornment.
